data.name: Highschool Romance
data.detailed_description:
It's the start of your final year of high school.

Because of a crazy mix-up by your parents, you are due to attend an all-girls school. Fortunately, the principal has a solution to this strange crisis.

You soon discover that what would have been a dream-come-true to many is actually a lot more complicated.
In this unusual situation, can you survive, make friends, or even find love?
data.about_the_game:
It's the start of your final year of high school.

Because of a crazy mix-up by your parents, you are due to attend an all-girls school. Fortunately, the principal has a solution to this strange crisis.

You soon discover that what would have been a dream-come-true to many is actually a lot more complicated.
In this unusual situation, can you survive, make friends, or even find love?
data.short_description: Can you find love as the only boy in an all-girls school? Find out, in this slice-of-life visual novel game with multiple endings.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP
  • 處理器: 1.66 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X version Leopard 10.5.8 or later
  • 處理器: 1.66 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
